overview: This mono-green Modern deck leverages +1/+1 counter synergies and life-loss acceleration to rapidly assemble a massive, equipped threat. By combining Basking Broodscale's combat damage triggers with Kozilek's Command and Blade of the Bloodchief, it aims to overwhelm opponents before they can stabilize. Devourer of Destiny provides board control while further fueling the counter engine.
win_conditions: Attacking with a Blade of the Bloodchief-equipped creature pumped by Kozilek's Command and Basking Broodscale triggers
Exiling key blockers with Devourer of Destiny to clear the path for lethal combat damage
Using Kozilek's Command to draw into finishers while simultaneously growing the board presence

keep_criteria: Hands with at least two lands and a one-drop or two-drop creature
Hands containing Kozilek's Command paired with early mana sources
Hands that include Blade of the Bloodchief and a creature to equip it to
mulligan_criteria: Hands with three or more lands and no early plays
Hands lacking any creatures or counter-generating effects
Hands with only high-cost finishers and no ramp

early_game: Prioritize land drops and play Basking Broodscale to establish early counter generation
Use Kozilek's Command for small X values to draw cards and add initial counters
Avoid overcommitting to life loss if opponent has early removal or burn
mid_game: Equip Blade of the Bloodchief to your largest creature before combat
Cast Devourer of Destiny to exile opponent's threats and transfer their counters to your board
Cycle through Kozilek's Command to maintain card advantage while steadily growing your threat
late_game: Focus on maximizing combat damage triggers to snowball counters
Use Kozilek's Command for larger X values to refill hand and pump for lethal
Maintain pressure to prevent opponent from setting up permanent answers or sweepers

key_cards.name: Basking Broodscale
key_cards.notes: Attack with this creature whenever possible to generate +1/+1 counters that can be distributed to larger threats

key_cards.name: Kozilek's Command
key_cards.notes: Balance life loss with board state; use the counter mode to pump equipped creatures and the draw mode to find answers

key_cards.name: Blade of the Bloodchief
key_cards.notes: Equip to your biggest creature before combat damage resolves to maximize the +X/+X bonus based on life lost that turn

key_cards.name: Devourer of Destiny
key_cards.notes: Target opponent's countered creatures to steal their growth, or use on blockers to clear the way while gaining trample

sequencing_tips: Always equip Blade of the Bloodchief before declaring attackers to ensure the life-loss bonus applies to combat damage
Cast Kozilek's Command on your turn before combat to maximize the +X/+X bonus from the Blade
Use Devourer of Destiny in response to opponent's ETB triggers or during their combat phase to disrupt their game plan
Save life total for Kozilek's Command when you need to draw into sweepers or additional finishers

matchups.advice: Manage life total carefully to avoid giving them free card advantage with Thoughtseize or Inquisition of Kozilek
Protect your key artifacts and creatures with counters, as they will target them with Lightning Bolts and Spell Snipers
Disrupt their early game by attacking with Basking Broodscale to prevent them from setting up their combo
